column1: This island used to be much___________(green) before the forest fires.
Slow down! You're___________(fit) than me and I can't keep up!
It's actually____________(trendy) to wear your hair up this year.
As the time for the performance got nearer, I got_____________(nervous).
Old people are often__________(wise) than young people.
Why don't you try and find a___________(cheap) computer game and save some money?
Matt seems to have got even________(lazy) than he used to be and almost never studies.
If the problem gets any________(serious), we may need to inform the manager about it.
If you work__________(quickly), you'll finish sooner and then you can go home earlier.
Ben says he's feeling much__________(well) after his illness.
I have even_________(little) free time this year then I did last year.
The news was much_________(bad) then anyone had feared.
You'll need to be able to run_________(far) than this if you're going to do the marathon.
